/usr/bin/ar qc libminiKen_engine.a CMakeFiles/miniKen_engine.dir/sessionStore/sessionMapObject.cpp.o CMakeFiles/miniKen_engine.dir/compressor/commentOut.cpp.o CMakeFiles/miniKen_engine.dir/compressor/compactBlock.cpp.o CMakeFiles/miniKen_engine.dir/decompressor/relaxCommentOut.cpp.o CMakeFiles/miniKen_engine.dir/decompressor/relaxCompactBlock.cpp.o CMakeFiles/miniKen_engine.dir/decompressor/relaxTextual.cpp.o CMakeFiles/miniKen_engine.dir/parser/querySquasher.cpp.o CMakeFiles/miniKen_engine.dir/parser/responseBuilder.cpp.o CMakeFiles/miniKen_engine.dir/orchestrator.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libminiKen_engine.a
